Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}I need to know the etiquette of this place. Are there any customs I should follow?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Oh, r-right, slurping is considered polite! I've heard about that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}I hope I can do this correctly...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}So we select the number of toppings ourselves? I see...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}How interesting that they leave that to the discretion of the consumer.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Oh! Understood. So it's important to eat quickly, then...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Sounds sensible. I imagine said eagerness shows respect to the chef, as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}A-All of it!? Does everyone do that...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Hmm... What a fascinating flavor...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}I thought it strange at first, but it carries with it a subtle complexity.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Excuse me, Mr. Chef de Cuisine?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Chef de cuisine? You talkin' to me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Your ramen is absolutely wonderful. It's been a while since I last gave my compliments to the chef.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Bouillon...? What the hell is that?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}If yer askin' about the recipe, sorry, miss. Can't tell ya.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}That's how we put bread on the table.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}So it's a secret recipe... I completely understand. You don't have to tell me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}You mentioned this dish puts bread on the table? I suppose that means it comes in sandwich form as well...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}I see. What a fascinating delicacy.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Uh, that ain't exactly... Well, whatever.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}The recipe of something this delectable could likely be patented and sold for quite a profit...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}Oh, sorry, um... My imagination got the best of me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}I'd been wanting to try ramen for a long time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}I would have been free to visit as I pleased, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}Dining alone is... rather awkward.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}I never had the opportunity to eat this kind of food growing up...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}The style of restaurant is new to me, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}So I have to admit... it's something I've always wanted to try.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I'm glad we came here today. You've already taught me so much about ramen etiquette.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}I would love to return here in the future.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I saw an unexpected side of Mitsuru.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like our relationship has grown...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We decided to go back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
